themes.name: Feature Requests And Issues
themes.description: Users are requesting new features and reporting issues with the app, affecting their trading experience. They are seeking improvements to make the app more useful and reliable.
representativeQuotes: BAD EXPERIENCE. DURING MCX TRADING ON 09 Jun 26 , MY OPTION BUY ORDER GOT STUCK
actionIdeas: Add stochastic indicator and other requested features to enhance user experience
Improve customer support and resolve issues with order placement and cancellation

themes.name: Ease Of Use
themes.description: Users praise the app's simplicity and ease of use, making it accessible to beginners. They appreciate the intuitive interface and fast access to services.
representativeQuotes: Easy Interface and Fast access to all the services
very easy to use this app.
it is very easy app to manage all mutual fund.
actionIdeas: Improve the onboarding process for new users
Enhance the app's navigation to make it even more intuitive

themes.name: Easy Investment Experience
themes.description: Users praise Groww for its user-friendly interface and ease of use for investing in stocks and mutual funds. They find it convenient for tracking portfolios and making informed investment decisions.
representativeQuotes: Very easy to use for investment in individual stocks and Mutual funds.
beginner's friendly, easy to use, Familiar Environment and easy to Track portfolio.
easy to trade and search easily any stocks.
actionIdeas: Enhance the app with more detailed research tools and analysis features
Integrate AI-powered predictive capabilities to improve investment decisions

themes.name: High Brokerage Charges
themes.description: Users are complaining about high brokerage charges and hidden fees, leading to a poor experience with the app. Many users are comparing Groww unfavorably to other apps.
representativeQuotes: worst experience in app very high brokerage charges
Charging too much, as compared to other apps.
brokerage charges increased, the charges are very high rs 5 per trade
actionIdeas: Review and adjust brokerage charges to be more competitive
Improve transparency around fees and charges to avoid surprising users

themes.name: Poor Customer Support
themes.description: Users are experiencing poor customer support and technical issues with the app. They are frustrated with the lack of reliable support and generic replies from the support team.
representativeQuotes: Customer support is the worst. Does not help
worst customer support very bad ,really very bad
User Interface is okay. But Customer Service is the worst.
actionIdeas: Improve customer support team training and responsiveness
Implement a more reliable and efficient issue resolution process
